description: An audio attachment for a post. Antiphony's contribution to the AT Protocol embed family — atproto has images/video/external/record embeds but no audio. Modeled on app.bsky.embed.video (blob + alt + captions), but audio-shaped.

main.description: The stored embed. Holds the audio blob and its universal, render-time-independent metadata. Does NOT carry the transcript — that is platform enrichment (dev.antiphony.audio.transcript) lifted into the #view at read time.

audio.description: The audio bytes, content-addressed by CID. Up to 100 MB.

durationMs.description: Duration of the audio in milliseconds. Milliseconds (not seconds) is the platform-wide unit.

alt.description: USER-authored short description of the audio (the audio analogue of image alt text). NOT the transcript.

waveform.description: Pre-computed visual waveform peaks (normalized 0–100) for instant rendering.

view.description: The hydrated, per-read view of an audio embed. Carries a resolved playback URL (in this centralized deployment, a signed Storage URL — not the raw blob) and the transcript lifted from the platform-enrichment record.

url.description: Resolved, playable audio URL (signed Storage URL in the centralized deployment; a blob/CDN URL under federation).

durationMs.description: Duration in milliseconds (copied from the record embed).

alt.description: User-authored short description (copied from the record embed).

waveform.description: Waveform peaks (copied from the record embed).

transcript.description: Machine transcript, lifted from the dev.antiphony.audio.transcript enrichment record at read time. Absent until transcription completes.
